creator: ben@lavery-griffiths.com
text:
Created attachment 180547
svn diff to upgrade to 1.1

gohugo has been updated to 0.19 (https://github.com/spf13/hugo/releases/tag/v0.19)

The attached svn diff brings this port up from 1.0 to 1.1

Tested against 10.3-RELEASE and 11.0-RELEASE, no issues building manually/poudriere. Poudriere logs attached.


root@freebsd-11:~/bunnysay # portlint -ACmtb
looks fine.
